nodes.label: Mahol
nodes.description: Dance, the father of four sons (1 Kings 4:31) who were inferior in wisdom only to Solomon.

nodes.label: Darda
nodes.description: Pearl of wisdom, one of the four who were noted for their wisdom, but whom Solomon excelled (1 Kings 4:31).

nodes.label: Ethan
nodes.description: “The Ezrahite,” distinguished for his wisdom (1 Kings 4:31). He is named as the author of the 89th Psalm. He was of the tribe of Levi.

nodes.label: Heman
nodes.description: 1 Kings 4:31; 1 Chr. 2:6, a son of Zerah, noted for his wisdom.

verses.text: For he was wiser than all men; than Ethan the Ezrahite, and Heman, and Chalcol, and Darda, the sons of Mahol: and his fame was in all nations round about.
